 val instagram: String? = null,

Illegal json parameter found: Java 8 date/time type `java.time.LocalDateTime` not supported by default: add Module "com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype:jackson-datatype-jsr310" to enable handling (or disable `MapperFeature.REQUIRE_HANDLERS_FOR_JAVA8_TIMES`)","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"57b81d58-d7bf-4b0e-bd80-e5d1967a7c69","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:18:49.762Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"f07bd728-d2db-4ac6-bd00-aa596512b624","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:18:56.120Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"e5e3505e-ef17-42e0-9c0b-767e2bc327b9","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:19:06.704Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"3a44acf8-b49d-4d58-bab2-cf8ef2cadf43","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:19:13.688Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"56b9793f-8554-4019-a82a-5403503f38d3","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:19:17.909Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"415083b1-cbe6-485e-b69f-0bc01f42152d","uuid":"ff9eab88-f410-4a9e-bbfb-b8e9397b3871","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":1761614316020,"toTimestamp":1761614369064,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"8f88ad24-c8ab-47c9-808c-5111f283a50f","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:20:42.619Z","request_message":"use predefinido","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"c2eafe43-0048-419f-8b29-48c734b9845d","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:20:52.327Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"5eb93242-cf1e-4744-9e61-e156627a3c76","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:20:57.406Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"93633f70-1f70-40f8-85d6-4c61bf632493","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:21:06.022Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"request_id":"987a93bc-a763-4f30-8fa2-b9a721e2a7be","uuid":"3fa9e430-df0a-4c77-bca7-57148996d267","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":1761614369064,"toTimestamp":1761614472890,"seen_state":"unseen"}],"feedbackStates":{"temp-fe-ee6a7385-6ba8-4855-85e5-f653f9ac6543":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-a847ddfb-2e27-4c5e-9fad-62e0443cf837":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-b22fad18-5332-4d9e-bbd3-3ede07e96236":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-4eecbbde-e987-42e1-a628-30472928e47f":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-cfd003d6-1284-4ae6-800d-ba0930e9ff7b":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-975a88f3-9e04-4b9c-8053-8581a6cbaaab":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-726e7eee-3c1d-4d62-9970-723464ab1962":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-45c10a5c-2adf-4a40-99d3-d3c20205b270":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-927f9dbc-5e5b-460f-a263-a9ff731e324e":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-7e0ac271-c77d-4200-8ab2-215b35397a58":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""}},"toolUseStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph"}]},"status":"draft"},"requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":true,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"hasAgentOnboarded":true,"hasDirtyEdits":true,"hasTitleGenerated":true},"personaType":0,"rootTaskUuid":"57061307-c96b-40ea-acac-90b06053499d"},"74e2cc5f-39ad-439d-8c4a-f86336bbcc3e":{"id":"74e2cc5f-39ad-439d-8c4a-f86336bbcc3e","createdAtIso":"2025-10-28T12:38:41.875Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-10-28T12:38:41.875Z","chatHistory":[],"feedbackStates":{},"toolUseStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph"}]},"mentioned_items":[],"status":"draft"},"requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":false,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"hasAgentOnboarded":true,"hasDirtyEdits":false},"personaType":0},"__NEW_AGENT__":{"id":"__NEW_AGENT__","createdAtIso":"2025-11-04T00:12:12.724Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-11-04T00:12:12.724Z","chatHistory":[],"feedbackStates":{},"toolUseStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph"}]},"status":"draft"},"requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":false,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"hasAgentOnboarded":true,"hasDirtyEdits":false},"personaType":0,"rootTaskUuid":"6c90c0f2-6354-4c32-afdf-97cc89534a10"}},"isContextPaneOpen":false,"isActionsPaneOpen":false,"isAgentEditsCollapsed":true},"currentConversationId":"5fd78c6d-6216-4e97-856d-f836d7ca77b6","pins":{},"agentExecutionMode":"auto","isPanelCollapsed":true,"displayedAnnouncements":[],"conversations":{"1f25fa73-a24f-420f-b3be-9467a015a7c9":{"id":"1f25fa73-a24f-420f-b3be-9467a015a7c9","name":"Fix Google OAuth CORS error
","createdAtIso":"2026-01-18T20:37:39.579Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2026-01-18T20:37:39.579Z","selectedModelId":"claude-sonnet-4-5","requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":false,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true},"personaType":0,"feedbackStates":{},"rootTaskUuid":"68974d14-770e-4b81-b8e7-bfbb48b77298","toolUseStates":{},"chatHistory":[{"request_id":"dd6ddfe4-38a6-4294-80a4-48f37e0d7bfb","uuid":"664014cc-7ef6-43e2-a8a3-1688b4514d80","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1768768659484,"seen_state":"seen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"0879a12e-adf9-43a8-b627-371e344c63c8","timestamp":"2026-01-18T22:35:03.942Z","request_message":"# Troubleshooting - Erro CORS com Google OAuth

## ❌ Erro Atual

```
Access to XMLHttpRequest at 'https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/auth?client_id=...'
(redirected from 'http://localhost:8080/api/auth/google') from origin 'http://localhost:3001'
has been blocked by CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is present on the requested resource.
```

## Causa do Problema

O **backend está implementado incorretamente**. Existem dois fluxos OAuth diferentes:

### ❌ O que o backend está fazendo (ERRADO)
**OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Flow** - Redirect tradicional
```
1. Frontend chama POST /api/auth/google
2. Backend redireciona para https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/auth
3. Usuário faz login no Google
4. Google redireciona de volta para /callback
5. Backend troca code por token
```

### ✅ O que o backend DEVERIA fazer (CORRETO)
**Google Identity Services - Credential Flow**
```
1. Frontend mostra botão do Google (popup)
2. Usuário faz login no popup
3. Google retorna credential (JWT) para o frontend
4. Frontend envia credential para POST /api/auth/google
5. Backend valida credential e retorna token da aplicação
```

## Solução

O backend precisa **aceitar o credential JWT** enviado pelo frontend, não fazer redirect.

### Implementação Correta do Backend

#### ❌ ERRADO (Atual)
```javascript
// NÃO FAÇA ISSO!
app.post('/api/auth/google', (req, res) => {
 // Redireciona para Google
 const authUrl = `https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/auth?client_id=...`;
 res.redirect(authUrl); // ❌ ERRADO!
});
```

#### ✅ CORRETO
```javascript
const { OAuth2Client } = require('google-auth-library');
const client = new OAuth2Client(process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID);

app.post('/api/auth/google', async (req, res) => {
 try {
 // 1. Recebe o credential do frontend
 const { credential } = req.body;
 
 if (!credential) {
 return res.status(400).json({ message: 'Credential é obrigatório' });
 }
 
 // 2. Valida o credential com Google
 const ticket = await client.verifyIdToken({
 idToken: credential,
 audience: process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID,
 });
 
 const payload = ticket.getPayload();
 
 // 3. Busca ou cria usuário
 let user = await User.findOne({ email: payload.email });
 
 if (!user) {
 user = await User.create({
 email: payload.email,
 name: payload.name,
 picture: payload.picture,
 provider: 'google',
 googleId: payload.sub,
 emailVerified: payload.email_verified
 });
 }
 
 // 4. Gera token JWT da aplicação
 const token = jwt.sign(
 { userId: user.id, email: user.email },
 process.env.JWT_SECRET,
 { expiresIn: '7d' }
 );
 
 // 5. Retorna token e dados do usuário
 res.json({
 token,
 user: {
 id: user.id,
 email: user.email,
 name: user.name,
 picture: user.picture,
 provider: user.provider
 }
 });
 
 } catch (error) {
 console.error('Google auth error:', error);
 res.status(401).json({ message: 'Falha na autenticação com Google' });
 }
});
```

## Checklist de Correção

### 1. Instalar Biblioteca Correta
```bash
# Node.js
npm install google-auth-library

# Python
pip install google-auth
```

### 2. Remover Código de Redirect
- [ ] Remover qualquer `res.redirect()` no endpoint `/api/auth/google`
- [ ] Remover código de OAuth Authorization Code Flow
- [ ] Remover endpoint `/callback` (não é necessário)

### 3. Implementar Validação de Credential
- [ ] Receber `{ credential }` no body da requisição
- [ ] Validar credential com `verifyIdToken()`
- [ ] Verificar audience (Client ID)
- [ ] Extrair dados do usuário do payload

### 4. Configurar CORS Corretamente
```javascript
// Node.js + Express
const cors = require('cors');

app.use(cors({
 origin: 'http://localhost:3000', // Frontend URL
 credentials: true
}));
```

### 5. Testar
```bash
# Teste manual com curl
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/auth/google \
 -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
 -d '{"credential": "eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIs..."}'
```

## Variáveis de Ambiente Necessárias

```env
# Backend .env
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=47481749184-lv7j2hj1v1id47jsfq8c3sf77rthjf3g.apps.googleusercontent.com
JWT_SECRET=your-super-secret-jwt-key
```

## Documentação de Referência

- **Implementação completa:** [BACKEND_INTEGRATION.md](BACKEND_INTEGRATION.md)
- **Arquitetura:** [ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md)
- **Testes:** [TESTING_GOOGLE_AUTH.md](TESTING_GOOGLE_AUTH.md)

## Diferenças entre os Fluxos

| Aspecto | Authorization Code Flow ❌ | Credential Flow ✅ |
|---------|---------------------------|-------------------|
| **Redirect** | Sim, para Google | Não, popup |
| **Frontend** | Recebe code | Recebe credential JWT |
| **Backend** | Troca code por token | Valida credential |
| **CORS** | Problemático | Sem problemas |
| **UX** | Sai da página | Popup rápido |
| **Complexidade** | Alta | Baixa |

## ✅ Como Verificar se Está Correto

Após corrigir o backend, teste:

1. **Requisição não deve redirecionar**
 ```bash
 curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/auth/google \
 -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
 -d '{"credential": "test"}' \
 -v
 ```
 
 ✅ Deve retornar JSON (200 ou 401)
 ❌ NÃO deve retornar redirect (302/307)

2. **Response deve ser JSON**
 ```json
 {
 "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...",
 "user": {
 "id": 1,
 "email": "user@example.com",
 "name": "User Name"
 }
 }
 ```

3. **Sem erros CORS no console do navegador**

## Ainda com Problemas?

Se após implementar corretamente ainda houver erro CORS:

1. **Verifique CORS no backend**
 ```javascript
 app.use(cors({
 origin: 'http://localhost:3000',
 credentials: true,
 methods: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE'],
 allowedHeaders: ['Content-Type', 'Authorization']
 }));
 ```

2. **Verifique a URL da API no frontend**
 ```env
 # .env
 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8080/api
 ```

3. **Reinicie ambos os servidores**
 ```bash
 # Backend
 # Ctrl+C e reiniciar
 
 # Frontend
 # Ctrl+C e npm run dev
 ```

## Exemplo Completo Funcionando

Veja o exemplo completo em [BACKEND_INTEGRATION.md](BACKEND_INTEGRATION.md) na seção "Exemplo Completo (Node.js + Express)".

---

**Resumo:** O backend está tentando fazer redirect OAuth quando deveria apenas validar o credential JWT enviado pelo frontend. Siga a implementação correta em [BACKEND_INTEGRATION.md](BACKEND_INTEGRATION.md).

Jackson LocalDateTime serialization error
","createdAtIso":"2025-10-28T01:18:36.019Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-10-28T01:21:06.022Z","feedbackStates":{},"requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":true,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"hasAgentOnboarded":true,"hasDirtyEdits":true,"hasTitleGenerated":true},"personaType":0,"rootTaskUuid":"57061307-c96b-40ea-acac-90b06053499d","toolUseStates":{},"chatHistory":[{"request_id":"3004a834-db2c-48c3-aef0-bc2329fd808f","uuid":"bca73572-570d-4c59-afaa-d1d2c02e0429","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1761614316020,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"03c1d9c3-7204-43f0-a4aa-3b4e87963dab","timestamp":"2025-10-28T01:18:38.035Z","request_message":"io.ktor.serialization.JsonConvertException:
